planPurchaseDate.status: EXISTS - Records when plan was purchased (one-time lifetime)

subscription.status: DEPRECATED - Not used in new system

accountModel.recommendation: Account model is well-structured. All critical subscription fields exist and are correctly implemented. mainStoreId, activePlan (CORE/SMART), subscriptionId, and planPurchaseDate support the one-time lifetime purchase model. Legacy subscription object should be marked as deprecated in documentation.

isExtraStore.status: EXISTS - Tracks if store is extra (SMART plan)

storeModel.recommendation: Store model is comprehensive. All fields for tracking main/extra stores exist. Note: Both is_main_store and storeType exist - consider consolidating for clarity. isExtraStore and extraStoreFee correctly support SMART plan's 4 extra stores feature @ ₹199 each. No expiry date needed (plan lifetime, not store-specific).

currentFields.ownerType: String enum [merchant, distributor] - Supports multi-owner types
currentFields.merchantId: ObjectId ref Account (LEGACY) - For backward compatibility
currentFields.planType: String enum [CORE, SMART] - Quick plan reference
currentFields.distributorId: ObjectId ref Account - Which distributor sold this
currentFields.status: String enum [trial, active, past_due, cancelled, expired]
currentFields.billingCycle: String enum [one-time] - Matches lifetime purchase model
currentFields.purchaseDate: Date - When plan was purchased (ONE-TIME LIFETIME)

fields.validUntil: Date - 90 days from grant (EXPIRY TRACKING FOR SCRATCHES)

subscriptionModel.recommendation: EXCELLENT DESIGN. Subscription model correctly implements ONE-TIME LIFETIME plan purchases (no expiryDate needed at subscription level). unlimitedScratches.validUntil correctly tracks 90-day quarterly entitlement. scratchPacks array handles post-unlimited purchases. Generic ownerType/ownerId supports both merchant and distributor ownership. Pre-save hook maintains backward compatibility.

limits.includes: maxStores, maxCampaigns, maxScratchCardsPerMonth, maxMonthlyScans, maxManagersPerAccount, maxRangesPerCampaign, maxQRBatches, etc.

features.includes: canCreateCampaign, canAddStore, canViewAnalytics, canUseAPI, canUseSMSIntegration, canAccessPrioritySupport, canUseMultiStore, etc.

price.note: NOT USED for one-time CORE/SMART purchases

subscriptionPlanModel.recommendation: SubscriptionPlan model is comprehensive with all necessary feature gating and quota definitions. Consider adding: lifetimePrice field, quarterlyUnlimitedScratchDays (=90), and extraStorePrice for clarity. Model supports both recurring and one-time plans well.

workflow: 2. Create new Subscription with status=active, billingCycle=one-time
4. Update Account with activePlan, subscriptionId, planPurchaseDate

missing: Store creation validation for SMART plan
apiActivate.recommendation: API endpoint is functional for one-time activation. IMPROVEMENTS: (1) Validate planId exists in SubscriptionPlan model. (2) Add storeLimitValidation - prevent CORE merchants from adding >1 store, SMART from >5. (3) Log all activations for audit trail. (4) Add explicit check that merchant doesn't already have active plan. (5) Return daysRemaining in response for unlimited scratches.

currentImplementation.purpose: Fetch merchant's current subscription + live usage
queryLogic: 1. Resolve merchantId (inherit from parentId if Manager)
3. Calculate live usage from Campaign and Account counts

criticalBugs: CRITICAL: References non-existent plan.features.maxScansPerMonth (should be plan.limits.maxMonthlyScans)
CRITICAL: References non-existent plan.features.maxManagers (should be plan.limits.maxManagersPerAccount)
BUG: Only supports merchantId field, ignores ownerType/ownerId
missing: Support for generic ownerType/ownerId ownership model
Unlimited scratch entitlement details (expiry date, daysRemaining)
Real usage from SubscriptionUsage model (hardcoded now)
apiCurrent.recommendation: URGENT FIXES NEEDED: (1) Fix field references - use plan.limits not plan.features. (2) Add ownerType/ownerId query support. (3) Populate SubscriptionUsage for real usage metrics. (4) Add scratch entitlement details with expiry information. (5) Calculate daysRemaining for unlimited scratches. (6) Include plan lifetime status.

currentCapabilities.quotaLimiting: Has metricMap translating limit names to usage metrics
currentCapabilities.genericOwnership: Supports both merchant and distributor owners

missing: Unlimited scratch expiry tracking - doesn't validate unlimitedScratches.validUntil
Scratch pack balance validation - doesn't check remaining in packs
Scratch entitlement as feature gate - separate from plan features
Detailed warning messages for why features are disabled
subscriptionAccessGuard.recommendation: Guard service has good structure with generic owner support. IMPROVEMENTS: (1) Add checkScratchEntitlement() - validate unlimited scratches haven't expired. (2) Check scratchPacks remaining balance. (3) Return detailed reason WHY feature disabled (not in plan vs quota exceeded vs scratch expired). (4) Calculate daysRemaining for unlimited scratch warnings. (5) Verify usage metric references match SubscriptionUsage model field names exactly.

metrics.includes: totalStoresCreated, activeCampaigns, scratchCardsGenerated, scratchCardsRedeemed, totalScans, totalParticipations, uniqueCustomers, managers, totalRewardsClaimed, apiCallsUsed, etc.

currentFields.quotaExceeded: Boolean flags for each limit type

methods.getCurrentUsage: Static method for fetching current usage

subscriptionUsageModel.recommendation: Model is comprehensive. Ensure: (1) incrementMetric is called on every subscription action (campaign creation, store addition, scratch allocation). (2) Monthly reset job properly sets resetAt timestamp. (3) Alerts array is maintained in real-time. (4) quotaExceeded flags trigger user notifications when thresholds exceeded.

corePlan.name: ScratchX Core
corePlan.features: Unlimited campaigns, unlimited scratches, 3 team members, basic analytics

smartPlan.name: ScratchX Smart
smartPlan.features: Everything in Core + multi-store, smart segmentation, WhatsApp integration, fraud protection

planPricingImplementation.recommendation: Plans are currently HARDCODED in route.js. This is acceptable for MVP but should migrate to database once payment integration is complete. Future consideration: Create ScratchPackModel for post-unlimited purchases (1000, 5000, 10000, 50000 scratches).

summary:
AUDIT COMPLETE - All core models and APIs exist for one-time lifetime subscription system.

STRENGTHS:
✓ One-time lifetime design correctly implemented (no expiry date at subscription level)
✓ Unlimited scratches with 90-day quarterly validity tracking (unlimitedScratches.validUntil)
✓ Generic owner support (merchant/distributor) via ownerType/ownerId
✓ Comprehensive feature gating (25+ flags) and quota enforcement
✓ Detailed usage metric tracking with monthly reset capability
✓ Store management fields support CORE (1 store) and SMART (5 stores) plans
✓ All models have proper indexing, validation, and timestamps

CRITICAL BUGS TO FIX:
✗ apiCurrent/route.js uses wrong field references (features vs limits)
✗ apiCurrent/route.js missing ownerType/ownerId query support
✗ subscriptionAccessGuard missing unlimited scratch expiry validation
✗ subscriptionAccessGuard missing scratch pack balance validation

TO IMPLEMENT FOR FINAL PHASE:
✗ Payment gateway integration (Razorpay for plan purchase)
✗ Store quota enforcement (prevent >1 for CORE, >5 for SMART)
✗ Unlimited scratch expiry notifications (30/7 days before expiry)
✗ Scratch pack purchase API endpoints
✗ Monthly usage reset scheduled job
✗ Comprehensive audit logging

CONCLUSION: Database schema is production-ready. All critical fields present. APIs need debugging before go-live.
